rules.rule_text:
rule Meduza
{
	meta:
		author = "MalBeacon"
		description = "Meduza system information file"
		reference = "https://github.com/MalBeacon/what-is-this-stealer"

	strings:
		$x1 = "HWID:" ascii
		$x2 = "Log Date:" ascii
		$x3 = "Build Name:" ascii
		$x4 = "Computer Name:" ascii
		$x5 = "Operation System:" ascii
		$x6 = "Execute Path:" ascii

	condition:
		all of them
}
